baseline_regime_summary: Deterministic fixture-scoped benchmark substrate baseline only prior to live procedural-depth artifacts.
non_regression_policy_summary: Non-regression posture is declared at substrate level only and may not be overread as empirical benchmark evidence before later projection lanes.
perturbation_axis_posture: Projection-specific perturbations are declared but empirically deferred to later V46 lanes.
reliability_policy_summary: Reliability posture is policy-declarative only in V46-A and must be empirically demonstrated later through repeated-run projection artifacts.
